description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the python:2.7 Docker image with a cache on the vendor/ directory. Define two stages: test and deploy. Add a test job in the test stage that runs on all branches except master, executes `pip install hyde` then `hyde gen`. Add a pages job in the deploy stage that runs only on the master branch, runs `pip install hyde` and `hyde gen -d public`, and publishes the generated public/ directory as a Pages artifact. Ensure the pipeline respects the cache and the only/except rules.
